micro_vortex_matrix.vortex_depth: 1.5 μm ±50 nm for optimal diffraction efficiency
micro_vortex_matrix.noise_tolerance: Spectral SNR > 20 dB for reliable phase reconstruction

optical_watermarking.frequency_spacing: Orthogonal frequencies prevent cross-talk between hash bits
optical_watermarking.key_management: theta_key must be securely stored for verification

homeostatic_control.kappa_range: κ ∈ [0.1, 2.0] sufficient for CAPTURE regime access
homeostatic_control.response_time: Actuator response < 1 ms required for real-time homeostasis
homeostatic_control.spectral_resolution: 1 nm resolution sufficient for error detection

recommended_next_steps: Export vortex model to Lumerical/MEEP for full-wave validation
Fabricate test matrix in PMMA via femtosecond laser writing
Characterize spectral response with benchtop spectrometer
Integrate Mach-Zehnder modulator on SiP platform
Implement FPGA-based PI controller for optical feedback
